properties.name: Ankou
properties.lore: The personification of death; collects souls in a creaking cart.

properties.name: Apsat
properties.lore: Caucasian spirit of birds and fish; protects hunters.

properties.name: Banshee
properties.lore: A wailing woman whose cries foretell a death in the family.

properties.name: Barbegazi
properties.lore: Alpine mountain men with giant feet used as snowshoes.

properties.name: Barstukas
properties.lore: Tiny earth men who live under elder trees and bring grain.

properties.name: Basajaun
properties.lore: The Lord of the Forest who taught humans metallurgy.

properties.name: Bean-nighe
properties.lore: The Washer at the Ford who cleans bloodied shrouds.

properties.name: Bwbach
properties.lore: A Welsh brownie that helps with chores but hates dissent.

properties.name: Clurichaun
properties.lore: A surly, drunken cousin of the leprechaun who raids cellars.

properties.name: Domovoy
properties.lore: The protective spirit of the Slavic household and hearth.

properties.name: Duergar
properties.lore: Malicious, dark-dwelling dwarves of the English hills.

properties.name: Dwarf
properties.lore: Subterranean smiths known for crafting legendary items.

properties.name: Gnome
properties.lore: Earth-dwelling spirits that guard underground treasure.

properties.name: Haltija
properties.lore: A guardian spirit assigned to a person, home, or forest.

properties.name: Kallikantzaros
properties.lore: Goblins that surface during the 12 days of Christmas.

properties.name: Kikimora
properties.lore: A female house spirit; helpful if clean, chaotic if not.

properties.name: Korrigans
properties.lore: Beautiful but dangerous fae who dance in stone circles.

properties.name: Leprechaun
properties.lore: A solitary cobbler who guards a pot of gold at the rainbow.

properties.name: Leshy
properties.lore: A forest guardian who can grow as tall as a tree.

properties.name: Lutin
properties.lore: A prankish French spirit that tangles hair into elf-locks.

properties.name: Aitvaras
properties.lore: A household spirit that looks like a rooster or a fireball.

properties.name: Afanc
properties.lore: A lake-dwelling beast that causes massive, drowning floods.

properties.name: Black Shuck
properties.lore: A spectral black dog with glowing eyes; an omen of death.

properties.name: Càssait-Bheinn
properties.lore: A giant, elusive bird of the Scottish Highlands.

properties.name: Cirein-cròin
properties.lore: A sea serpent so large it feeds on seven whales.

properties.name: Fenrir
properties.lore: The monstrous wolf of Norse myth, destined to kill Odin.

properties.name: Iku-Turso
properties.lore: A terrifying, multi-tentacled sea monster of the North.

properties.name: Kraken
properties.lore: A colossal sea beast that creates ship-sinking whirlpools.

properties.name: Lavellan
properties.lore: A rat-like water creature with highly poisonous skin.

properties.name: Marool
properties.lore: A malevolent sea fish with multiple eyes and a finned crest.

properties.name: Nessie
properties.lore: The long-necked, elusive resident of Loch Ness.

properties.name: Otso
properties.lore: The sacred Spirit of the Bear in Finnish mythology.

properties.name: Sleipnir
properties.lore: Odin’s eight-legged stallion, the fastest of all horses.

properties.name: Water Horse
properties.lore: Predatory horses that lure people into the water to drown.

properties.name: Wolpertinger
properties.lore: A small Bavarian hybrid (rabbit with antlers and wings).

properties.name: Centaur
properties.lore: A creature with the upper body of a human and the body of a horse.

properties.name: Satyr
properties.lore: A forest spirit with the upper body of a man and the legs of a goat.

properties.name: Minotaur
properties.lore: A monster with the head of a bull and the body of a man, kept in a labyrinth.

properties.name: Harpy
properties.lore: A predatory creature with the head of a woman and the body of a bird.

properties.name: Scylla
properties.lore: A sea monster with multiple heads and tentacles emerging from her waist.

properties.name: Mermaid
properties.lore: An aquatic entity with a human upper body and a fish-like tail.

properties.name: Sirena
properties.lore: Similar to a mermaid, often lure sailors with enchanting songs.

properties.name: Sphinx
properties.lore: A creature with the head of a human, body of a lion, and wings.

properties.name: Manticore
properties.lore: A beast with a human face, lion body, and a venomous scorpion tail.

properties.name: Faun
properties.lore: A peaceful woodland spirit, half-human and half-goat.

properties.name: Gorgon
properties.lore: Humanoid with snakes for hair; their gaze turns living things to stone.

properties.name: Ichthyocentaur
properties.lore: A sea-being with a human torso, horse forelegs, and a fish tail.

properties.name: Larnia
properties.lore: A female demon who devours children; often depicted as half-serpent.

properties.name: Nixie
properties.lore: Water spirits that appear human but can take on fish-like traits.

properties.name: Sileni
properties.lore: Older, wiser, and often drunken companions of Dionysus.

properties.name: Triton
properties.lore: A merman of the deep, often acting as a messenger for the sea gods.

properties.name: Cynocephaly
properties.lore: A race of humans with the heads of dogs, often found in early travelogues.

properties.name: Each-Uisge
properties.lore: A shapeshifting water spirit that often takes a handsome human form.

properties.name: Melusine
properties.lore: A feminine spirit of fresh water, often appearing with a serpent tail.

properties.name: Rusalka
properties.lore: A vengeful water spirit that lures men into the water to drown.

properties.name: Griffin
properties.lore: A creature with the body of a lion and the head and wings of an eagle.

properties.name: Hippogriff
properties.lore: The legendary offspring of a griffin and a mare, with a horse's hindquarters.

properties.name: Chimera
properties.lore: A fire-breathing hybrid featuring a lion’s head, a goat’s body, and a serpent tail.

properties.name: Pegasus
properties.lore: A divine winged stallion, usually white, born from the blood of Medusa.

properties.name: Questing Beast
properties.lore: A strange beast with a snake's head, leopard's body, and lion's legs.

properties.name: Catoblepas
properties.lore: A buffalo-like creature with a heavy head that always hangs down.

properties.name: Leucrotta
properties.lore: A hybrid of a hyena and a stag with a wide mouth reaching to its ears.

properties.name: Yale
properties.lore: An antelope-like beast with swiveling horns that can move independently.

properties.name: Cockerel
properties.lore: A hybrid bird, often associated with the Basilisk's birth or warding spirits.

properties.name: Hippocamp
properties.lore: A sea-horse with the forequarters of a horse and the tail of a fish.

properties.name: Sea-Goat
properties.lore: A creature with the upper body of a goat and the tail of a fish.

properties.name: Ophiotaurus
properties.lore: A hybrid with the front half of a bull and the tail of a serpent.

properties.name: Musimon
properties.lore: A hybrid of a goat and a sheep, possessing the horns of both.

properties.name: Monoceros
properties.lore: A stag-headed creature with a horse's body and a single spiral horn.

properties.name: Bonnacon
properties.lore: A bull-like creature with inward-curving horns that defends itself with caustic dung.

properties.name: Lindworm
properties.lore: A wingless, bipedal dragon with a long serpentine body.

properties.name: Tarasque
properties.lore: A six-legged beast with a lion's head, turtle's shell, and bear claws.

properties.name: Vouivre
properties.lore: A winged serpent or wyvern with a large ruby set into its forehead.

properties.name: Culebre
properties.lore: A giant winged serpent that guards treasures in caves.

properties.name: Balaur
properties.lore: A multi-headed dragon of enormous size that can control the weather.

properties.name: Hydra
properties.lore: A swamp-dwelling water serpent that regrows two heads for every one lost.

properties.name: Zmey
properties.lore: A Slavic dragon that can be benevolent protectors of crops or malicious.

properties.name: Guivre
properties.lore: A venomous serpentine dragon that lacks wings and legs.

properties.name: Knucker
properties.lore: A water dragon that lives in deep knuckerholes in the English countryside.

properties.name: Lambton Worm
properties.lore: A giant, legless serpent that coiled around a hill and terrorized a village.

properties.name: Peluda
properties.lore: A green, porcupine-like dragon that shoots poisonous quills.

properties.name: Pukis
properties.lore: A multi-headed household dragon that brings wealth to its owner.

properties.name: Aitvaras (Serpent)
properties.lore: A household spirit that appears as a fiery serpent in the sky.

properties.name: Chuvash Dragon
properties.lore: A shapeshifting dragon that can take human form to lure victims.

properties.name: Ladōn
properties.lore: A hundred-headed serpent that guarded the Golden Apples.

properties.name: Python
properties.lore: The earth-dragon of Delphi, slain by the god Apollo.

properties.name: Bolsh
properties.lore: A massive, destructive serpent from Balkan folklore.

properties.name: Dragonet
properties.lore: A smaller, often venomous species of regional dragon.

properties.name: Drakon
properties.lore: A giant, sharp-sighted serpent or dragon of Greek myth.

properties.name: Fire-Drake
properties.lore: A classic fire-breathing dragon inhabiting caves and hoarding gold.

properties.name: Wulver
properties.lore: A wolf-headed man who leaves fish on the windowsills of the poor.

properties.name: Cu Sith
properties.lore: A giant green hound that silences its victims with three barks.

properties.name: Cadejo
properties.lore: A spectral dog that can be either a protector or a curse.

properties.name: Barghest
properties.lore: A demonic black dog with huge teeth and claws.

properties.name: Gallytrot
properties.lore: A white, shadowy dog that chases travelers at night.

properties.name: Moddey Dhoo
properties.lore: A spectral black spaniel that haunts Peel Castle.

properties.name: Skvader
properties.lore: A Swedish hybrid with the forequarters of a hare and the back of a wood grouse.

properties.name: Jackalope
properties.lore: A hare with deer antlers; while famously American, it has roots in European horned hare lore.

properties.name: Karkinos
properties.lore: A giant crab that assisted the Hydra in its battle against Heracles.

properties.name: Caladrius
properties.lore: A snow-white bird that can predict if a sick person will recover by looking at them.

properties.name: Stymphalian Bird
properties.lore: Man-eating birds with metallic feathers and sharp brass beaks.

properties.name: Salamander
properties.lore: A lizard-like creature able to live in and extinguish fire.

properties.name: Aspidochelone
properties.lore: A sea monster so large its back is mistaken for an island with trees.

properties.name: Fastitocalon
properties.lore: A giant turtle-island monster that sinks when sailors light fires on its back.

properties.name: Gulon
properties.lore: A gluttonous creature with a cat-like head and a dog's body that eats incessantly.

properties.name: Kudiani
properties.lore: A shapeshifting sorceress or bird-spirit from Georgian legend.

properties.name: Laukosargas
properties.lore: A Lithuanian spirit that guards the fields and ensures a good harvest.

properties.name: Baubas
properties.lore: A dark, spindly-fingered spirit used to scare children into behaving.

properties.name: Vadājs
properties.lore: A forest spirit that leads travelers in circles until they are hopelessly lost.

properties.name: Liche
properties.lore: A skeletal, undead being that has retained its intelligence and magic.

properties.name: Dahu
properties.lore: A mountain goat with legs shorter on one side to better walk on slopes.

properties.name: Matagot
properties.lore: A black cat spirit that brings wealth if treated with great respect.

properties.name: Wichtel
properties.lore: Small, helpful house-elves in Germanic folklore that perform chores at night.

properties.name: Heinzelmännchen
properties.lore: Household gnomes from Cologne who did the work of lazy bakers.

properties.name: Kobold
properties.lore: Ambivalent spirits that can help in mines or cause domestic chaos.

properties.name: Nix
properties.lore: A shapeshifting water spirit that lures people to deep water with music.

properties.name: Nökke
properties.lore: A Scandinavian water spirit known for playing the violin to lure victims.

properties.name: Vodyanoy
properties.lore: A frog-like water spirit that causes floods and pulls people underwater.

properties.name: Bolotnik
properties.lore: A swamp spirit covered in algae who mimics the sounds of animals.

properties.name: Polevik
properties.lore: A field spirit with skin the color of soil and hair like grass.

properties.name: Ovinnik
properties.lore: A malevolent barn spirit that appears as a black cat with burning eyes.

properties.name: Vila
properties.lore: Beautiful mountain nymphs who can heal or shoot arrows at enemies.

properties.name: Samovila
properties.lore: Forest spirits in the Balkans who guard the waters and dance in circles.

properties.name: Zmey Gorynych
properties.lore: A three-headed Russian dragon that kidnaps women and burns villages.

properties.name: Poludnica
properties.lore: The Lady Midday who strikes those working in the fields during high noon.

properties.name: Besta
properties.lore: A Portuguese monstrous beast often used as a general term for demons.
